MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND TO ENTER CONSENT JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, AFFIDAVIT, DECLARATION, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BURLINGTON COAT FACTORY WAREHOUSE CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND TO ENTER CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (GRANT). ORDER & JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/JU), REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR#7855
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-27-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-08-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-08-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
